mirror_image.name: Mirror Image
mirror_image.description: Setup/Builder: Create a flickering decoy. Grants [Mirrored] stacks (max 3). Each stack gives 15% Evasion. Generates 15 Concentration and +1 Mirage Pip. No cooldown.

color_spray.name: Color Spray
color_spray.description: Setup: A burst of dazzling light. Applies [Blinded] (4 ticks) to the target. If target is already [Marked], the duration is doubled.

hallucinate.name: Hallucinate
hallucinate.description: Setup: Warp the target's perception. Applies [Dazed] (6 ticks) and [Off-Balance]. Dazed targets take increased psychic damage.

mind_shatter.name: Mind Shatter
mind_shatter.description: Payoff/Finisher: Shatter the illusions within the target's mind. Consumes [Blinded] or [Dazed] to deal 3x psychic damage and apply [Staggered] (2 ticks).

phantasmal_inferno.name: Phantasmal Inferno
phantasmal_inferno.description: Payoff/AOE: Unleash a tide of psychic fire. Deals fire/psychic damage to all in the room. Damage is increased by 20% per [Mirrored] stack active on you.

prism_cloak.name: Prism Cloak
prism_cloak.description: Defense/Reaction: Shimmering refractive shield. On hit, you have a 30% chance to blink to a random position and gain [Concealed] for 3 ticks. Lasts 6 ticks.

phase_shift.name: Phase Shift
phase_shift.description: Mobility: Teleport to a targeted spot. Leaves a decoy behind that explodes (AOE Blind) on the next tick. Clears [Slowed].

invisibility.name: Invisibility
invisibility.description: Utility: Master-level deception. Grants [Concealed] for 20 ticks to yourself and all allies in the room. This effect breaks on action.
